entries.name: Payment Settlement
entries.description: Attestation that a payment settled or reached a declared finality state.

entries.name: Service Delivery
entries.description: Attestation that a service, API response, content access, or agent task was delivered.

entries.name: Mandate Compliance
entries.description: Attestation that an action complied with a mandate, scope, amount limit, purpose code, and replay controls.

entries.name: Incident Report
entries.description: Initial signed report of a security, fraud, scam, policy, or impersonation incident.

entries.name: Incident Validation
entries.description: Attestation validating, rejecting, updating, or resolving a prior incident report.

entries.name: Fraud Report
entries.description: Initial fraud allegation or fraud-related report.

entries.name: Fraud Validation
entries.description: Attestation validating or rejecting a fraud report after review.

entries.name: Dispute Opening
entries.description: Attestation that a dispute was opened against an event, obligation, payment, or credential.

entries.name: Dispute Outcome
entries.description: Attestation of dispute resolution, rejection, withdrawal, or supersession.

entries.name: Reputation Snapshot
entries.description: Attestation of contextual reputation or risk metrics for a defined evidence set and time window.

entries.name: Creditworthiness
entries.description: Attestation about credit reliability, repayment history, credit facility status, or credit policy eligibility.

entries.name: PQC Readiness
entries.description: Attestation about post-quantum cryptography support, rotation, revocation, and recovery readiness.

entries.name: Certification
entries.description: Attestation that an agent, peer, or implementation meets a stated certification or conformance scope.

entries.name: Revocation
entries.description: Attestation revoking or suspending a credential, peer status, key, mandate, or certification.
